# Bundled font notice

Chroni bundles the following variable fonts through Fontsource:

| Font | Fontsource package | Version | License |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Noto Sans SC | `@fontsource-variable/noto-sans-sc` | 5.2.10 | SIL Open Font License 1.1 |
| Noto Serif SC | `@fontsource-variable/noto-serif-sc` | 5.2.10 | SIL Open Font License 1.1 |
| Source Sans 3 | `@fontsource-variable/source-sans-3` | 5.2.9 | SIL Open Font License 1.1 |
| Source Serif 4 | `@fontsource-variable/source-serif-4` | 5.2.9 | SIL Open Font License 1.1 |

Font files source: https://github.com/fontsource/font-files

The full license text is preserved in `OFL-1.1.txt`.
